items.mistake: await-ing independent calls one by one in a loop.
items.fix: Start them together and await Promise.all.
items.why: Sequential awaits multiply latency for calls that could run in parallel.

items.mistake: Forgetting to await an async call.
items.fix: await it (or explicitly handle the returned Promise).
items.why: The code continues before the result is ready, causing race conditions and lost errors.
items.example:
```ts
async function save() { await db.write(...) }
save()                // BAD — function returns before write finishes; no error visible
await save()          // GOOD — wait for completion; errors propagate
```

items.fix: Wrap awaits in try/catch or attach .catch.
items.why: Unhandled rejections crash processes or hide failures.

items.mistake: Using Promise.all when some calls may fail but you still want the rest.
items.why: Promise.all rejects on the first failure, discarding other results.
